chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3810 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.17415/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.15601/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 16.9.2025 Mr. Muhammad Anees advocate for the petitioners -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. The case of the petitioners is pending before the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) as the petitioners have moved a complaint under the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) on 25.7.2025. The Director General SBCA is directed to expedite the complaint of the petitioners lodged through the SCRM and ensure that the same is decided in accordance with its own SOPs within a period of six weeks of the date of this order. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General SBCA, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
